# Description

# [PKT-PRV-058](task-0125): Provider Data Quality Rules

## Purpose

Implement provider data quality rules.

## Scope

- Rule format
- Evaluation
- Reporting

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Implement evaluation
3. Add reporting

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Evaluation works
3. Reports generated
